issuer_name_as_stated: Not stated in the provided section
extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters involving the Company, Subsidiaries, Directors, Promoters and Group Companies, and distinguishes criminal, statutory/regulatory and tax proceedings, as well as matters brought by versus against those parties. I counted one criminal proceeding against a Director, no criminal proceedings against the Company, Subsidiaries, Promoters or Group Companies, no statutory/regulatory proceedings against any listed entity, and six tax proceedings against Subsidiaries; I excluded the one criminal proceeding by a Director and the one civil proceeding by Group Companies. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is the Subsidiaries’ direct and indirect tax amount of ₹0.09 million; converted at ₹10 million per crore, this equals ₹0.009 crore. No contingent-liabilities total, going-concern statement or statutory-auditor report status is disclosed in the provided risk section. The revenue percentages disclosed are segment-level figures for Veranda Race and Edureka, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration; the source litigation unit is millions and the conversion used is 1 crore = ₹10 million.
